subject: fix(pwa): review cleanup — unused prop, bare globals, misnamed cache
body:
1. DebugPill PwaDiagnosticsTab: removed unused textColor param
2. DebugPill runPwaDiagnostics: prefixed bare location/document
   with window. for codebase consistency
3. sw.js cacheFirst: was storing images in FONT_CACHE — changed to
   STATIC_CACHE since it handles both fonts and images. Removed
   dead FONT_CACHE constant and activate filter reference.

Tags: pwa, cleanup, review
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-alignment
